cards.name: King of Cups
cards.interpretation: wise, diplomatic, balance between head and heart, devoted, advisor, counsellor

cards.name: Page of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: foolish, immature, irresponsible, lazy, underachiever, procrastinator, missed chances, poor prospects

cards.name: Ⅳ The Emperor
cards.interpretation: stability, structure, protection, authority, control, practicality, focus, discipline
